description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa upholstered in a textured blue fabric. The sofa features two large, rectangular seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be uniform in size and shape. The armrests are straight, flat, and extend from the seat to the backrest, providing a clean, boxy silhouette. The sofa stands on four slender, black metal legs, slightly angled for stability and a contemporary look. The back of the sofa is plain and fully upholstered, with no visible seams or decorative elements. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern blue two-seater sofa with straight armrests, uniform cushions, and slim black metal legs. The upholstery is textured, giving it a contemporary and inviting appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat cushions, two matching backrest cushions, and straight armrests on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the thickness of the seat and back cushions, and the straight, flat armrest profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, fully upholstered back with no visible seams or decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, showing the sofa's depth and the clean lines of the armrest and cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all loose and rectangular, arranged side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, flat armrests at seat height, boxy profile, fully upholstered with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, black metal legs positioned at the corners, slightly angled outward, exposed and minimalistic.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two loose, rectangular cushions, continuous and unadorned.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric with a subtle woven texture, no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
